problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: If Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
